original_prompt: 给这四个包装（可以改变位置大小不能改变细节），首饰盒——包装盒——首饰盒包装——包装袋，做一张淘宝详情页。要求几何背景。
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
"A high-end commercial product photography shot for a Taobao detail page. The subject is a cohesive luxury packaging suite [Subject Lock: vibrant orange palette, shopping bag, rigid box, insert box, jewelry case]. The items are arranged artistically on a stage of modern, matte-finished geometric forms (cubes, steps, and architectural blocks) in neutral tones of soft beige and warm grey to let the orange pop. The tall shopping bag stands at the back, the rigid boxes are placed on mid-level geometric podiums, and the open jewelry case is in the foreground to showcase its white interior details. Lighting is soft, directional studio light creating elegant, clean shadows."

[Text & UI Layout]
"***Layout Style**: Balanced Geometric Composition (几何平衡排版).
Text Rendering Instructions:
1. **Mood Title**: Content: “奢华典藏” (Luxury Collection). Style: [Elegant, high-contrast Serif font, Gold or Dark Brown]. Position: [Upper left or right negative space, balanced against the bag].
2. **Description**: Content: “精湛工艺 · 专属礼遇”. Style: [Minimalist Sans-serif, small, clean]. Position: [Below the main title]."
layout_logic: 建议采用'金字塔式'或'阶梯式'构图。将最高的购物袋放在后方作为视觉锚点，两个较大的盒子放在中景，最小且打开的首饰盒放在前景最显眼的位置（C位），引导视线聚焦于核心产品细节。文字应利用几何背景留出的纯色区域进行排版，避免压盖产品。
